description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 15, 2026 at 11:59 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Palo Alto, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Alma Street near W. Meadow Drive. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound in the left lane on Alma Street when it slowed to a stop in a queue of traffic for a red light at 
the intersection with W. Meadow Drive. While the Waymo AV was stopped, an SUV traveling northwestbound in the left lane on Alma 
Street behind the Waymo AV proceeded to change lanes to the left, and began to enter the adjacent median. As the SUV continued to enter 
the median, the front right side of the SUV made contact with the rear left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
